hero.lede: RWA-Index is an academic research tool that provides the RARM methodology framework for structured due diligence on tokenized real-world asset protocols.

academic.title: Academic Methodology
academic.body: The RARM (RWA Asset Risk Matrix) is a six-layer structured due diligence framework developed for academic and practitioner research on tokenized real-world asset protocols.

private.title: Private by Design
private.body: All due diligence workbooks are stored privately and accessible only to the user who created them. RWA-Index never publishes, aggregates, or derives platform-level ratings from user data.

ai.title: AI as Research Aid
ai.body: Our AI assistant (DeepSeek) generates verification checklists — questions to investigate, public data sources, and red flags — to help users conduct their own thorough research. It produces no scores.

market.title: Transparent Market Data
market.body: The Protocol Directory relays publicly available TVL data from DeFiLlama. No proprietary scoring, ranking algorithms, or platform assessments are applied to this data.

isNot.heading: RWA-Index Is NOT
isNot.creditRating: A credit rating agency or provider of credit rating services
isNot.investmentAdviser: An investment adviser or provider of investment recommendations
isNot.financialProvider: A regulated financial services provider in any jurisdiction
isNot.scoringPublisher: A publisher of protocol assessments, scores, or risk opinions
isNot.operator: An operator of any pooled fund, tokenisation platform, or custodian

is.heading: RWA-Index IS
is.researchTool: An academic research tool for structured RWA due diligence
is.workbook: A private workbook environment for registered practitioners
is.methodologyProvider: A methodology provider (RARM framework) for self-directed analysis
is.dataRelay: A relay of publicly available DeFiLlama market data
is.checklistGenerator: An AI-assisted checklist generator to support independent research

regulatory.heading: Regulatory Status
regulatory.p1: RWA-Index does not hold a Type 10 (Providing Credit Rating Services) licence from the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission (SFC), nor an equivalent licence in any other jurisdiction.
regulatory.p2: The platform is designed specifically to avoid activities that would constitute regulated credit rating services: it does not produce platform-generated ratings, does not publish user assessments, and does not distribute scores to third parties.
regulatory.readTerms: Read full Terms of Use & Disclaimer →

cta.lede: Create a free account to access the RARM due diligence workbook. Your analyses are stored privately and reflect only your own professional judgment.
